visa_types.name: Business or Conference
visa_types.documents_required:
To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
• Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.
• Please prepare and arrange documents according to this Checklist, also prepare an additional copy of your Passport ID page for Passport Collection.
• Applicant can be asked for additional documents or may be called for an interview if deemed necessary by the Embassy.
• The Visa fee, according to Schengen regulations, is non-refundable.
• Cambodian documentation shall be accompanied by a translation from an authorized translation bureau.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table:Business or Conference]

Please Note:
All charges (Visa Fee, VFS service charges and other charges) are to be paid in USD cash and KHQR Scan.
• The applicable visa fee is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change. All the fees are non-refundable.
Please click here (https://www.migrationsverket.se/en/you-want-to-apply/visiting-sweden/visiting-sweden-for-up-to-90-days-entry-visa.html) for other exceptions to the visa fee

VFS Service fee USD 25.00 ( EUR 21 )

• There is a service charge levied per application above the visa fees.
• The Visa Application Centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost.
• The fees are non-refundable.
• Please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/khm/en/swe/additional-services) for more information on the optional service.
• All charges (Visa Fee, VFS service charges and other charges) are to be paid in USD cash and KHQR Scan.
visa_types.forms:
Schengen Visa Application Form - English (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7l3Z43SaEWMBZ7h5sWZVan/6a1d9591f6615071d7c0ff7c3b1bc571/application-for-schengen-visa.pdf) -to be completed, signed and dated. Please ensure that application forms for minors are signed by both parents. 
Schengen Visa Application Form - Swedish  (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3aaTmmq0lcGbMtQZFuCOUW/906c276550993fb59e7b7c0b6c9f52eb/sweden-application-from-swedish-updated.pdf)-to be completed, signed and dated. Please ensure that application forms for minors are signed by both parents. 
To Download a Form:
1. Click on the form link.
2. When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
1. Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
2. Select Save Target As from the list
3. Save the form on your computer
visa_types.overview:
Overview
A business visa is granted for those who are visiting Sweden for business or conference meetings.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
A business visa is granted for those who are visiting Sweden for business or conference meetings.

## Visa Fees

[Table:Business or Conference]

Please Note:
All charges (Visa Fee, VFS service charges and other charges) are to be paid in USD cash and KHQR Scan.
• The applicable visa fee is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change. All the fees are non-refundable.
Please click here (https://www.migrationsverket.se/en/you-want-to-apply/visiting-sweden/visiting-sweden-for-up-to-90-days-entry-visa.html) for other exceptions to the visa fee

VFS Service fee USD 25.00 ( EUR 21 )

• There is a service charge levied per application above the visa fees.
• The Visa Application Centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost.
• The fees are non-refundable.
• Please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/khm/en/swe/additional-services) for more information on the optional service.
• All charges (Visa Fee, VFS service charges and other charges) are to be paid in USD cash and KHQR Scan.

## Documents Required
To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
• Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.
• Please prepare and arrange documents according to this Checklist, also prepare an additional copy of your Passport ID page for Passport Collection.
• Applicant can be asked for additional documents or may be called for an interview if deemed necessary by the Embassy.
• The Visa fee, according to Schengen regulations, is non-refundable.
• Cambodian documentation shall be accompanied by a translation from an authorized translation bureau.

## Photo Specifications
A Photograph submitted with the application form should comply with the following specifications:
- • 1 Color photographs printed on normal photographic paper
- • Passport sized 45mm x 35mm or 2 inches
- • White background
- • Taken not later than 6 months
- • Close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70 -80% of the photograph
- • In sharp focus and clear of high quality with no ink marks or creases
- • Should be without sunglasses, hat or cap
Remarks: The above photograph requirement also applies to minors from 0-11 years old.

## Download Forms
Schengen Visa Application Form - English (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7l3Z43SaEWMBZ7h5sWZVan/6a1d9591f6615071d7c0ff7c3b1bc571/application-for-schengen-visa.pdf) -to be completed, signed and dated. Please ensure that application forms for minors are signed by both parents. 
Schengen Visa Application Form - Swedish  (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3aaTmmq0lcGbMtQZFuCOUW/906c276550993fb59e7b7c0b6c9f52eb/sweden-application-from-swedish-updated.pdf)-to be completed, signed and dated. Please ensure that application forms for minors are signed by both parents. 
To Download a Form:
1. Click on the form link.
2. When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
1. Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
2. Select Save Target As from the list
3. Save the form on your computer

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Tourist visa is granted for those where the intention is to visit Sweden for tourism and sightseeing without having an invitation from a Swedish reference.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Tourist visa is granted for those where the intention is to visit Sweden for tourism and sightseeing without having an invitation from a Swedish reference.
                                                                

## Visa Fees

[Table:Tourist]
Please Note:
All charges (Visa Fee, VFS service charges and other charges) are to be paid in cash only in USD cash and KHQR Scan.
• The applicable visa fee is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change. All the fees are non-refundable.
Please click here (https://www.migrationsverket.se/en/you-want-to-apply/visiting-sweden/visiting-sweden-for-up-to-90-days-entry-visa.html) for other exceptions to the visa fee

VFS Service fee USD 25.00 ( EUR 21 )

• There is a service charge levied per application above the visa fees.
• The Visa Application Centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost.
• The fees are non-refundable.
• Please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/khm/en/swe/additional-services) for more information on the optional service.
• All charges (Visa Fee, VFS service charges and other charges) are to be paid in USD cash and KHQR Scan.

## Documents Required

To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
• Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.
• Please prepare and arrange documents according to this Checklist, also prepare an additional copy of your Passport ID page for Passport Collection.
• Applicant can be asked for additional documents or may be called for an interview if deemed necessary by the Embassy.
• The Visa fee, according to Schengen regulations, is non-refundable.
• Cambodian documentation shall be accompanied by a translation from an authorized translation bureau.

## Photo Specifications
A Photograph submitted with the application form should comply with the following specifications:
- • 1 Color photographs printed on normal photographic paper
- • Passport sized 45mm x 35mm or 2 inches
- • White background
- • Taken not later than 6 months
- • Close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70 -80% of the photograph
- • In sharp focus and clear of high quality with no ink marks or creases
- • Should be without sunglasses, hat or cap
Remarks: The above photograph requirement also applies to minors from 0-11 years old.

## Download Forms
Schengen Visa Application Form - English (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7l3Z43SaEWMBZ7h5sWZVan/6a1d9591f6615071d7c0ff7c3b1bc571/application-for-schengen-visa.pdf) -to be completed, signed and dated. Please ensure that application forms for minors are signed by both parents. 
Schengen Visa Application Form - Swedish  (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3aaTmmq0lcGbMtQZFuCOUW/906c276550993fb59e7b7c0b6c9f52eb/sweden-application-from-swedish-updated.pdf)-to be completed, signed and dated. Please ensure that application forms for minors are signed by both parents.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa is provided for those who are visiting family and/-or friends. The inviting person has to fill out the invitation form number 241011.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa is provided for those who are visiting family and/-or friends. The inviting person has to fill out the invitation form number 241011.

## Visa Fees
